hypothesis: A multimodal molecular encoder-decoder trained on SMILES, SELFIES, InChI, IUPAC name, molecular formula, SPG polymers, and electrolyte formulations will learn a unified latent representation in which the same molecule is consistently represented across modalities, and this alignment will improve downstream property prediction accuracy across MoleculeNet small molecules, polymer, and electrolyte datasets and cross-representation translation quality between modalities.
